de.purpose: Zur Darstellung eines stationären Aufenthalt oder ambulante Kontakt eines Patienten in einer Gesundheitseinrichtung.
keywords: stationärer Aufenthalt, ambulanter Aufenthalt, Einrichtungskontakt, Versorgungstellenkontakt, Abteilungskontakt

at0000.1.description: Strukturierte Sammlung von Informationen zu einem Sachverhalt oder Problem, der bzw. das bearbeitet werden muss. Die Bearbeitungsschritte eines Falles werden durch Aktivitäten und Bearbeiter definiert, die dem Fall zugeordnet werden.

Location includes both casual locations (a place used for health care without prior designation or authorisation) and dedicated, formally designated locations. The sites can be private, public, mobile or fixed.

at0024.1.description: A group of buildings or other locations such as a site or campus. For example: Campus that is outside the facility, but belongs to the hospital, university.

at0000.1.description: Eine fachliche Einheit, Organisation, Abteilung, Zusammenschluss, Gruppierung mit einem gemeinsamen Ziel.
To record case identification details for public health purposes.
For registrering av case identifikasjons detaljer for offentlige helseformål.
لتسجيل تفاصيل تعريف الحالة لأغراض الصحة العامة
Zur Erfassung von Details zur Identifikation eines Falls im Gesundheitswesen.

author.name: Michael Lieser
author.organisation: University of Heidelberg, Department of Infectious Diseases

author.name: Lars Bitsch-Larsen
author.organisation: Haukeland University Hospital of Bergen, Norway

translations.accreditation: MD, DEAA, MBA, spec in anesthesia, spec in tropical medicine.

at0000.1.description: An entity comprising one or more people and having a particular purpose.
at0000.1.comment: For example: a company, institution, association, network, department, community group, healthcare practice group, payer/insurer, care team, or a group of neighbours who provide care or support.

at0000.1.description: En entitet som består av ett eller flere mennesker med et bestemt formål.
at0000.1.comment: For eksempel: Et firma, institusjon, selskap, forening, nettverk, avdeling, gruppe i nærmiljøet, forsikringsselskap, behandlingsteam eller en gruppe av naboer som opptrer som støtte.

at0000.1.description: Eine Einheit, die aus einer oder mehreren Personen besteht und ein bestimmtes Ziel hat.
at0000.1.comment: Zum Beispiel: ein Unternehmen, eine Institution, ein Verband, ein Netzwerk, eine Abteilung, eine Gemeindegruppe, eine Gesundheitspraxisgruppe, ein Kostenträger/Versicherer, ein Pflegeteam oder eine Gruppe von Nachbarn, die Pflege oder Unterstützung leisten.

at0000.1.description: *An entity comprising one or more people and having a particular purpose. (en)
at0000.1.comment: *For example: a company, institution, association, network, department, community group, healthcare practice group, payer/insurer, care team, or a group of neighbours who provide care or support. (en)

at0079.1.description: Variante o subtipo específico del Diagnóstico, si procede.
at0079.1.comment: Por ejemplo: "neuropatía axonal motora aguda" como variante del síndrome de Guillain-Barré. Siempre que sea posible, es preferible codificar el nombre de la variante con una terminología.

at0009.1.description: Descripción narrativa del problema o diagnóstico.
at0009.1.comment: Se utiliza para proporcionar antecedentes y contexto, incluida la evolución, los episodios o exacerbaciones, los progresos y cualquier otro detalle pertinente, sobre el problema o el diagnóstico.

at0079.1.description: *Specific variant or subtype of the Diagnosis, if relevant. (en)
at0079.1.comment: *For example: 'acute motor axonal neuropathy' as a variant of Guillain-Barre Syndrome. Coding of the name of the variant with a terminology is preferred, where possible.  (en)

at0009.1.description: Descripción narrativa del problema o diagnóstico.
at0009.1.comment: Utilizar para proveer trasfondo y contexto, incluyendo evolución, episodios o exacerbaciones, progreso y cualquier otro detalles relevante acerca del problema o diagnóstico.

at0079.1.description: Spezifische Variante oder Subtyp der Diagnose, falls relevant.
at0079.1.comment: Zum Beispiel: „Akute motorische axonale Neuropathie“ als Variante des Guillain-Barre-Syndroms. Wo möglich, ist die Kodierung des Namens der Variante über eine Terminologie zu bevorzugen.

at0009.1.description: Beschreibung des Problems oder der Diagnose.
at0009.1.comment: Wird verwendet, um Hintergrund und Kontext, einschließlich Entwicklung, Episoden oder Verschlechterungen, Fortschritt und andere relevante Details über das Problem oder die Diagnose zu liefern.

at0079.1.description: Specific variant or subtype of the Diagnosis, if relevant.
at0079.1.comment: For example: 'acute motor axonal neuropathy' as a variant of Guillain-Barre Syndrome. Coding of the name of the variant with a terminology is preferred, where possible.

at0009.1.description: Narrative description about the problem or diagnosis.
at0009.1.comment: Use to provide background and context, including evolution, episodes or exacerbations, progress and any other relevant details, about the problem or diagnosis.

at0079.1.description: *Specific variant or subtype of the Diagnosis, if relevant. (en)
at0079.1.comment: *For example: 'acute motor axonal neuropathy' as a variant of Guillain-Barre Syndrome. Coding of the name of the variant with a terminology is preferred, where possible.  (en)

at0009.1.description: *Narrative description about the problem or diagnosis.(en)
at0009.1.comment: *Use to provide background and context, including evolution, episodes or exacerbations, progress and any other relevant details, about the problem or diagnosis.(en)

at0079.1.description: *Specific variant or subtype of the Diagnosis, if relevant. (en)
at0079.1.comment: *For example: 'acute motor axonal neuropathy' as a variant of Guillain-Barre Syndrome. Coding of the name of the variant with a terminology is preferred, where possible.  (en)

at0009.1.description: Descrição narrativa sobre o problema ou diagnóstico.
at0009.1.comment: Usar para fornecer conhecimento e contexto, incluindo evolução, episódios ou exacerbações, progresso e quaisquer outros detalhes relevantes, sobre o problema ou diagnóstico.

at0079.1.description: Spesifikk variant eller subtype av diagnose, hvis det er relevant.
at0079.1.comment: For eksempel "akutt motorisk aksonal nevropati" som en variant av Guillain-Barre Syndrom. Koding av navnet på varianten med en terminologi er foretrukket hvis mulig.

at0009.1.comment: Brukes til å gi bakgrunn og kontekst, inkludert utvikling, episoder eller forverringer, fremgang og alle andre relevante detaljer, om problemet eller diagnosen.

at0079.1.description: *Specific variant or subtype of the Diagnosis, if relevant. (en)
at0079.1.comment: *For example: 'acute motor axonal neuropathy' as a variant of Guillain-Barre Syndrome. Coding of the name of the variant with a terminology is preferred, where possible.  (en)

at0009.1.description: En beskrivning av problemet eller diagnosen.
at0009.1.comment: Används för att ge bakgrund och kontext, inklusive utveckling, episoder eller exacerbationer, framsteg och andra relevanta detaljer om problemet eller diagnosen.

at0079.1.description: *Specific variant or subtype of the Diagnosis, if relevant. (en)
at0079.1.comment: *For example: 'acute motor axonal neuropathy' as a variant of Guillain-Barre Syndrome. Coding of the name of the variant with a terminology is preferred, where possible.  (en)

at0009.1.description: 문제 또는 진단에 대한 서술 기록.
at0009.1.comment: 문제와 진단에 대한 진화(evolution)와 에피소드 또는 악화, 경과를 포함한 배경과 문액 그리고 다른 관련된 상세내용을 제공하는데 사용함.

at0079.1.description: *Specific variant or subtype of the Diagnosis, if relevant. (en)
at0079.1.comment: *For example: 'acute motor axonal neuropathy' as a variant of Guillain-Barre Syndrome. Coding of the name of the variant with a terminology is preferred, where possible.  (en)

at0009.1.comment: *Use to provide background and context, including evolution, episodes or exacerbations, progress and any other relevant details, about the problem or diagnosis.(en)

at0079.1.comment: *For example: 'acute motor axonal neuropathy' as a variant of Guillain-Barre Syndrome. Coding of the name of the variant with a terminology is preferred, where possible.  (en)

at0009.1.description: Descrizione narrativa del problema o della diagnosi.
at0009.1.comment: Utilizzare questo campo per fornire il background e il contesto, compresa l'evoluzione, gli episodi o le esacerbazioni, i progressi e qualsiasi altro dettaglio rilevante circa il problema o la diagnosi.

at0079.1.comment: *For example: 'acute motor axonal neuropathy' as a variant of Guillain-Barre Syndrome. Coding of the name of the variant with a terminology is preferred, where possible.  (en)

at0009.1.description: *Narrative description about the problem or diagnosis.(en)

at0009.1.comment: *Use to provide background and context, including evolution, episodes or exacerbations, progress and any other relevant details, about the problem or diagnosis.(en)

at0079.1.description: 当前诊断的特定变体/变异类型或亚型/子类型（如果相关/合适）。
at0079.1.comment: 例如：“急性运动轴突性神经病”（acute motor axonal neuropathy）就属于是吉兰-巴雷综合征（Guillain-Barre Syndrome）的变体。尽可能首选采用术语标准对变体/亚型的名称进行编码。

at0009.1.description: 关于当前问题或诊断的叙述性描述。
at0009.1.comment: 用于提供关于问题或诊断的背景和上下文/语境，包括发展演变、片段或恶化、进展和任何其他相关的详情。
